curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff: the get_link method in operatorlink.py called XComModel.deserialize_value() on untrusted XCom data. The fix replaces full deserialization with json.loads + stringify, avoiding arbitrary class instantiation. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization (CWE-502) is correct — the vulnerability is deserialization of untrusted XCom payloads enabling arbitrary object instantiation. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
